title: The Darkness Before Them
author: Matthew Ward
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "The Darkness Before Them" book by Matthew Ward?
Options:
A. Kat clenched her fists and resisted the desire to punch him. "This is what Vallant intended, right? For my hands to be as bloody as his. Because then I'm forced to stay with him. Since otherwise people will have died for no reason." Rîma, Zephyr, Tatterlain - everyone who had survived over ten months with Vallant - none of them appeared to be very fond of him, while Jaîna, Amarid and other new recruits were awestruck by his fame. But they remained with him nonetheless. Was this the reason? "No wonder you pass so much time acting like someone you aren't!"
B. Kat made fists with her hands and resisted the desire to punch him. "This is what Vallant was after, right? My hands being as bloody as his. Because then I'm forced to remain with him. Since otherwise people will have been killed for naught." Rîma, Zephyr, Tatterlain – everyone who had made it past ten months with Vallant – none of them appeared to be very fond of him, while Jaîna, Amarid and other fresh recruits were awestruck by his fame. But they stuck with him regardless. Was this why? "No wonder you pass so much time acting like someone other than yourself!"
C. Kat bunched her fists and fought the urge to swing at him. “This is what Vallant wanted, isn’t it? My hands as bloody as his. Because then I have to stick with him. Because otherwise people have died for nothing.” Rîma, Zephyr, Tatterlain – everyone who’d beaten the ten-month average and survived years in Vallant’s orbit – none of them seemed to like him very much, whereas Jaîna, Amarid and other fresh recruits were dazzled by his legend. But they stayed with him all the same. Was this why? “No wonder you spend so much time pretending to be someone you’re not!” 
D. Kat balled her fists and fought back the urge to take a swing at him. "This is what Vallant wanted, isn't it? For me to have blood on my hands like he does. So I have to continue following him. Because if not, people will have been killed for nothing." Rîma, Zephyr, Tatterlain – all those who had beaten the ten-month survival rate with Vallant – none of them seemed to actually like him very much, while Jaîna, Amarid and other new members were dazzled by his legend. But they stayed with him just the same. Was this the reason? "No wonder you spend so much time pretending to be someone else!"  
Answer:
